pr-evidence/native-engine-integration-do.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found that the first draft overclaimed SGLang live-request coverage and used ambiguous profile wording for hardware targets. The PR scoped live request-flow language to vLLM, added the SGLang current-evidence caveat, clarified hardware-target wording, and the reviewer approved the corrected documentation.
verification: GPT-5.5 review found two documentation-scope issues; both were fixed before approval
what_changed: Added docs/native-engine-integration.md with Cachet launch-config examples, vLLM and SGLang provider wiring, kv_transfer_params handoff steps, and release evidence guidance.
Linked the native engine integration guide from the README, docs README, and V1 requirements matrix.
Added governance coverage that executes the launch-config example and checks the documented vLLM/SGLang provider paths and current benchmark-evidence references.
pr-evidence/native-engine-integration-do.why: The one-repo Cachet package needs an end-to-end native engine integration guide so users can connect cache generation, handoff bundles, launch configs, and provider-backed serving evidence without relying on scattered implementation notes.
